sentences.arabic: يَشْهَدُ الْعَالَمُ الْيَوْمَ عَوْدَةً مَلْحُوظَةً إِلَى أَسَالِيبِ الطَّهِيِ الْبَطِيءِ الَّتِي كَانَتْ تُمَيِّزُ الْمَطَابِخَ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةَ فِي الشَّرْقِ الْأَوْسَطِ.
sentences.translation: Svijet danas svjedoči primjetnom povratku metodama sporog kuhanja koje su karakterisale tradicionalne kuhinje na Bliskom istoku.
sentences.translationEn: The world today is witnessing a noticeable return to slow cooking methods that characterized traditional kitchens in the Middle East.

sentences.arabic: فَالْأَطْبَاقُ الَّتِي تُطْهَى فِي أَوْعِيَةٍ فَخَّارِيَّةٍ لِسَاعَاتٍ طَوِيلَةٍ تَحْتَفِظُ بِعَنَاصِرِهَا الْغِذَائِيَّةِ وَتُبْرِزُ عُمْقَ النَّكَهَاتِ الْأَصِيلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Jela koja se satima kuhaju u zemljanim posudama zadržavaju svoje hranljive sastojke i ističu dubinu autentičnih ukusa.
sentences.translationEn: Dishes cooked in clay pots for long hours retain their nutritional elements and highlight the depth of authentic flavors.

sentences.arabic: وَلَوْ نَظَرْنَا إِلَى النِّظَامِ الْغِذَائِيِّ الْمُنْتَشِرِ فِي حَوْضِ الْمُتَوَسِّطِ، لَوَجَدْنَا اعْتِمَادًا كَبِيرًا عَلَى زَيْتِ الزَّيْتُونِ وَالْبُقُولِيَّاتِ وَالْخُضْرَوَاتِ الطَّازَجَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kada bismo pogledali ishranu rasprostranjenu u mediteranskom bazenu, pronašli bismo veliko oslanjanje na maslinovo ulje, mahunarke i svježe povrće.
sentences.translationEn: If we look at the diet prevalent in the Mediterranean basin, we find a great reliance on olive oil, legumes, and fresh vegetables.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ هَذَا النَّمَطَ مِنَ التَّغْذِيَةِ لَا يُشْبِعُ الْجَسَدَ فَحَسْبُ، بَلْ يُسَاهِمُ أَيْضًا فِي الْوِقَايَةِ مِنْ أَمْرَاضِ الْعَصْرِ الْمُزْمِنَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj način ishrane ne samo da zasićuje tijelo, već doprinosi i prevenciji hroničnih bolesti savremenog doba.
sentences.translationEn: This pattern of nutrition does not just satisfy the body, but also contributes to the prevention of chronic modern-day diseases.

sentences.arabic: لِذَا، يَجِبُ عَلَى الْأَجْيَالِ الصَّاعِدَةِ إِدْرَاكُ أَهَمِّيَّةِ الْمَكَوِّنَاتِ الْمَحَلِّيَّةِ وَالِابْتِعَادِ عَنِ الْأَطْعِمَةِ السَّرِيعَةِ الْمُعَالَجَةِ.
sentences.translation: Stoga, generacije koje dolaze moraju spoznati važnost lokalnih sastojaka i kloniti se prerađene brze hrane.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, rising generations must realize the importance of local ingredients and stay away from processed fast foods.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي نِهَايَةِ الْمَطَافِ، يَبْقَى الطَّعَامُ الصِّحِّيُّ وَالْمُتَوَازِنُ رُكْنًا أَسَاسِيًّا لِتَحْقِيقِ جَوْدَةِ الْحَيَاةِ وَالرَّفَاهِيَةِ الْبَدَنِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju krajeva, zdrava i uravnotežena hrana ostaje osnovni stub za postizanje kvaliteta života i fizičkog blagostanja.
sentences.translationEn: In the end, healthy and balanced food remains a fundamental pillar for achieving quality of life and physical well-being.
